title: Idris b. 'Abdallah b. Hasan's Escape to the Maghrib and His Foundation of the Idrisid Dynasty in Morocco
description: Idris b. 'Abdallah b. Hasan's Escape to the Maghrib and His Foundation of the Idrisid Dynasty in Morocco. Recorded under the year 169 AH (786–787 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 30.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
